name: Chris Koster
subject: My Dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer |
body:
Hi,

Some of my most cherished memories are of the many times my Dad took me to baseball and football games when I was young. A lot of people knew my Dad, Rich, because he was a sports columnist for the St. Louis Globe-Democrat.

Neighbors and strangers would stop him in the grocery store to talk about the latest Cardinals news and he always obliged, giving them a little glimpse of what it was like to have a front row seat to everyone’s favorite team. But at the game, it was just Dad and me.

Happy Father’s Day to every proud Missouri dad -- I hope you enjoy a great summer day celebrating.

Chris Koster

------------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer |
------------------------------------------------------------------

Koster for Missouri
PO Box 1551
Jefferson City MO 65102 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/8133487285301020672/91056655835727872.

name: Hilary, Natalie, and Claire, RoyCooper.com
subject: Happy Father's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
For Father's Day, we want to take a moment to celebrate our hero and role model -- our dad.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202176/2fde7c66/403e69df/156a12a3/2808411121/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIifQ==/ "http://www.airmccrory.com?utm_campaign=adv_airmc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160610_adv_gq_airmc_ful__mj&firstname=&lastname=")
---
Friend, For Father's Day, we want to take a moment to celebrate our hero and role model -- our dad. From the sidelines of our basketball games, to the front row at our plays, to drilling us on multiplication tables, our dad has never stopped cheering us on. He encouraged us to pursue our individual passions and prompted us to grow into women who chase our dreams. Because of his unwavering support, each of us have been able to do just that. Everyday our dad approaches his work with the same enthusiasm. No one knows better than we do the tireless effort he puts in so that every child in North Carolina can have the same kind of opportunities we did. We are so blessed to have a father that like him. **And now, we 're so happy that we get to share him with you.** Thanks for everything, Dad. Hilary, Natalie, and Claire Cooper

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 10587
Raleigh NC 27605 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202176/2fde7c66/403e69df/156a12a2/2808411121/VEsE/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

name: The Kids
subject: Sign Steve's Father's Day Card!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend --

This morning we made our Dad egg burritos, and we are looking forward to packing a picnic and taking a hike!

Dad always tells us how lucky we are to grow up here and the importance of valuing and protecting what makes Montana great.

[**We hope you'll join us in signing his Father 's Day card to thank him for all he does for our family and state.**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0zjYLnemZZZhHz6PHrbsigmURl%2B3IxN9)

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=w0tKaKyYYDj1WyYvBq1dOgmURl%2B3IxN9)
---

Each of us wrote him our own card, and we know it would mean a lot to our Dad to see your name on this card as well. [**Take a moment to sign today.**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=v3v3x0MUdk8DVvbueRyKfwmURl%2B3IxN9)

Happy Father's Day!
Caroline, Alexandria and Cameron

| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Mr%2BVQ3bNzIV7%2F70DZoOYOgmURl%2B3IxN9)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=EULKBuaqEIKyrIJ%2FVa0x1QmURl%2B3IxN9).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---

body:

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Do you have a minute to tell us what you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Your opinions matter! | Friend --

This team is making history every day, and our hundreds of thousands of volunteers help drive every part of what we're doing. From Iowa to California, volunteers made calls and knocked on doors to deliver primary victories across the country -- that’s how we secured this nomination. As we start gearing up for the general election, we’ll need our group of committed supporters more than ever.

Our records indicate that you have not spent time volunteering -- **[and we’d like to find out why!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)** (And if you HAVE volunteered, please forgive us for the error! You’re amazing.)

We’d love to hear your opinion about volunteering and what you think would be the most valuable way to spend some time making sure Hillary gets to the White House.

**What do you say, will you tell us what you think? Your voice will help this team make history:**

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary for America

| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU3NzUwNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODI0MzQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Your opinions matter! | Friend -- This team is making history every day, and our hundreds of thousands of volunteers help drive every part of what we're doing. From Iowa to California, volunteers made calls and knocked on doors to deliver primary victories across the country -- that’s how we secured this nomination. As we start gearing up for the general election, we’ll need our group of committed supporters more than ever. Our records indicate that you have not spent time volunteering -- (And if you HAVE volunteered, please forgive us for the error! You’re amazing.) We’d love to hear your opinion about volunteering and what you think would be the most valuable way to spend some time making sure Hillary gets to the White House. What do you say, will you tell us what you think? Your voice will help this team make history: Thanks, Hillary for America | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
